<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Fetch Pricing"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/billing/pricing"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return the effective pricing map: plan slug -&gt; normalized pricing.

Mirrors `AGENTA_BILLING_PRICING` after validation/normalization
(see `ee.src.core.subscriptions.settings._normalize_pricing_entry`).

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./fetch-billing-pricing.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./fetch-billing-pricing.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
